summary: Meeting Auto-Creation Fix Testing Complete. Backend: 12/13 tests passed (1 skipped - provider status endpoint not available). Frontend: All UI tests passed. The fix for video meeting link auto-generation (Teams, Meet) is working correctly. Pre-created Teams appointment has valid meeting_join_url (teams.microsoft.com), pre-created Meet appointment has valid meeting_join_url (meet.google.com). Frontend correctly displays 'Rejoindre la réunion' link with data-testid='meeting-join-url', meeting provider badge with data-testid='meeting-provider-badge', and hides 'Créer le lien de réunion' button when meeting_join_url exists. Physical appointments correctly don't show meeting section.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/appointments/{teams_id} returns status='active'
Backend: GET /api/appointments/{teams_id} returns meeting_join_url with teams.microsoft.com URL
Backend: GET /api/appointments/{teams_id} returns external_meeting_id
Backend: GET /api/appointments/{meet_id} returns status='active'
Backend: GET /api/appointments/{meet_id} returns meeting_join_url with meet.google.com URL
Backend: GET /api/appointments/{meet_id} returns external_meeting_id
Backend: Physical appointments have meeting_join_url=None
Backend: appointment_lifecycle.py has meeting auto-creation logic (create_meeting_for_appointment)
Backend: meeting_provider_service.py has placeholder rejection logic (guarantee-first)
Backend: .env has real Microsoft credentials (UUID format, not placeholders)
Frontend: Teams appointment shows 'Teams' provider badge (data-testid='meeting-provider-badge')
Frontend: Teams appointment shows 'Rejoindre la réunion' link (data-testid='meeting-join-url')
Frontend: Teams appointment shows external meeting ID (data-testid='external-meeting-id')
Frontend: Teams appointment does NOT show 'Créer le lien de réunion' button
Frontend: Meet appointment shows 'Google Meet' provider badge
Frontend: Meet appointment shows 'Rejoindre la réunion' link with meet.google.com URL
Frontend: Meet appointment shows external meeting ID
Frontend: Meet appointment does NOT show 'Créer le lien de réunion' button
Frontend: Physical appointment does NOT show meeting provider badge
Frontend: Physical appointment does NOT show meeting join URL
Frontend: Physical appointment does NOT show 'Créer le lien de réunion' button
Frontend: Physical appointment shows 'Lieu' (location) section
critical_code_review_comments: Backend appointment_lifecycle.py correctly implements meeting auto-creation at lines 108-130: checks appointment_type=='video' and meeting_provider!='external', calls create_meeting_for_appointment()

Backend meeting_provider_service.py correctly implements placeholder rejection at line 149: placeholder_values = {'detect-presence', 'guarantee-first', 'placeholder', 'your-tenant-id', 'your-client-id'}
Backend .env has real Microsoft Azure credentials restored (MICROSOFT_CLIENT_ID, MICROSOFT_TENANT_ID, MICROSOFT_CLIENT_SECRET)

Frontend AppointmentDetail.js correctly displays meeting_join_url at lines 960-1001: shows 'Rejoindre la réunion' link when meeting_join_url exists, shows 'Créer le lien de réunion' button only when meeting_join_url is empty and provider!='external'
seed_data_creation: Pre-created appointments used for testing: Teams appointment (32df02d5-2ddf-4e46-92f5-f555b7351ef6) with meeting link, Meet appointment (5ff50dea-cb72-4534-b685-f8bda2414d33) with meeting link
context_for_next_testing_agent: Meeting auto-creation fix fully tested. Key points: 1) Teams appointment has valid meeting_join_url (teams.microsoft.com), 2) Meet appointment has valid meeting_join_url (meet.google.com), 3) Frontend correctly displays 'Rejoindre la réunion' link with data-testid='meeting-join-url', 4) Frontend correctly hides 'Créer le lien de réunion' button when meeting_join_url exists, 5) Physical appointments correctly don't show meeting section. The fix involved: (1) Restored real Microsoft Azure credentials in .env, (2) Added placeholder rejection in meeting_provider_service.py is_configured(), (3) Added error logging in appointment_lifecycle.py.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Microsoft Teams credentials in /app/backend/.env were overwritten with placeholder values ('guarantee-first') during a previous feature implementation, causing TeamsMeetingClient.is_configured() to return False and preventing meeting auto-creation
reproduction_steps: 1. Create a video appointment with meeting_provider='teams' and penalty_amount > 0
2. User has saved default_payment_method_id, so appointment auto-activates
4. TeamsMeetingClient.is_configured() returns False because credentials are placeholders
5. Meeting creation fails silently, meeting_join_url remains empty
fix_applied: 1. Restored real Microsoft Azure credentials in /app/backend/.env (MICROSOFT_CLIENT_ID, MICROSOFT_TENANT_ID, MICROSOFT_CLIENT_SECRET)
2. Enhanced is_configured() guard in meeting_provider_service.py to reject known placeholder values
3. Added error logging in appointment_lifecycle.py when meeting creation fails
